title: T920 Application to amend a registered pension plan - Canada.ca
content:
## T920 Application to amend a registered pension plan

## Notice to the reader
The Registered Plans Directorate has developed new versions of Form T510, Application to Register a Pension Plan , and Form T920, Application to Amend a Registered Pension Plan . These forms were redesigned to streamline the plan registration and amendment processes by assessing the potential risk involved with each of these submissions. The glossary has also been updated.
As with previous versions of Form T510 and Form T920, you must answer all questions on the forms completely and accurately.
You must use the new version of the T510 E (16) and T920 E (16) for all plan registrations and amendments submitted after April 30, 2017. As of May 1, 2017, we will not accept applications that use a previous version of the T510 or T920. They will be returned to the sender. Incomplete forms will continue to be returned to the sender, as stated in Newsletter 04-2R, Registered Pension Plan Applications - Processing an Incomplete Application .
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t920-fill-23e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (t920-fill-23e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (t920-23e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (t920-23e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- T510 Application to register a pension plan
- Registered Pension Plans Glossary

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
